metadata.description: Stackdrop internal marketplace. Install 'stack-pill' to set up the team's base skills/plugins.

plugins.name: stack-pill
plugins.description: Base setup pill: one command installs Impeccable + Superpowers (deps), Graphify, the mattpocock skills, Context7, Playwright, skill-creator, chrome-devtools-mcp, CodeRabbit, and ponytail, and injects a usage guide for all of them.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques.

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: Design fluency for frontend development: the impeccable skill, manual-edit agent, and design-detector hook.
